---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Deon Roos"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="home-split">
  <div class="home-left">
    <h1 class="home-title">I'm Deon Roos.<br>I do stuff.</h1>
    <p class="home-sub">Lecturer | Scientist | Statistician</p>
    <div class="home-items">
      <div class="home-item">
        <span class="home-item-label">Data</span>
        <p class="home-item-text">Messy, real-world observations that rarely measure what you actually care about directly.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="home-item">
        <span class="home-item-label">Fields</span>
        <p class="home-item-text">Interdisciplinary, but a lot in biology and medicine.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="home-item">
        <span class="home-item-label">Philosophy</span>
        <p class="home-item-text">Picking the right tool for the question matters more than having a favourite one.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="home-contact">
      <a href="mailto:deon.roos4@abdn.ac.uk" class="home-contact-link" title="Email"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4866-7472" class="home-contact-link" title="ORCID"><i class="fab fa-orcid"></i></a>
      <a href="https://github.com/DeonRoos" class="home-contact-link" title="GitHub"><i class="fab fa-github"></i></a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="home-right">
    <video autoplay muted loop playsinline class="home-video">
      <source src="media/mu_wave.mp4" type="video/mp4">
    </video>
    <div class="home-eq-overlay" aria-hidden="true">
```

$$\mu_i = f(\rho_{0,i}) + f(\rho_{1,i}) + f(\rho_{2,i})$$

$$\rho_{j,i} = T + \left(\frac{1}{\zeta_{j,i}}\right) \times D_{j,i} \quad \text{for } j \in \{0, 1, 2\}$$

$$D_{j,i} = -\sqrt{(x_j - x_i)^2 + (y_j - y_i)^2}$$

$$\zeta_{j,i} = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \times z_i$$

```{=html}
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
